message:
refactor(macros): clarify sa_column fallback logic after code review

Simplify column_constraints logic and update comments to accurately
reflect that validation prevents conflicting attribute combinations:
- Remove unnecessary fallback to field.column_constraints when
  sa_column.check is empty (validation ensures this can never happen)
- Update comments to clarify that validation prevents both sa_column
  and field-level attributes from being set simultaneously
- No behavior changes - just clarity improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
